meaning: n.<美>(水道)受圆木阻塞,停滞状态,僵局
examples: A new initiative was needed to break the logjam.
Such a logjam does not exist.
An early election might break the logjam.
That is the type of activity needed to break the logjam in the credit markets.
Now the Congress needs to respond by quickly breaking the logjam on the jobs crisis.
